description_long: This is a mid-top, lace-up casual boot constructed primarily from tan-brown leather with a white rubber sole and a dark brown padded collar. The shoe features reinforced stitching along the sides and a pull tab at the heel for easy wearing. The laces are thick and two-toned, threaded through metal eyelets for durability. The side of the shoe displays the 'CAT' branding, indicating it is from Caterpillar, a brand known for rugged footwear. The outsole appears to have a grippy, textured pattern suitable for urban environments. The overall design suggests comfort, durability, and style for everyday urban use.
description: A tan-brown leather mid-top boot with a white sole, padded collar, and visible 'CAT' branding, designed for urban wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the tan leather upper, white sole, brown padded collar, and detailed stitching.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, thick two-tone laces, and symmetrical lace-up design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible 'CAT' branding and reinforced stitching details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the pull tab, padded collar, and heel construction.
attribute_logo: Embossed 'CAT' logo on the outer heel in black.
